Left causes the bottom row [2,0,0,4] -> [2,4,0,0], improving compactness while preserving 6 empties and keeping larger tiles concentrated on the left side, which is a good sub-goal for future merges. So left is safest and most positionally useful.

Left column is strong/stacked (4,32,16,16), and there is an immediate merge opportunity on the bottom row if moving left or right (16,2,0,0 -> left gives 16,2; right gives 16,2 shifted only, no merge).
